name: Aim True, Aim Quick
rawText: For Rush (10), gain +100% Crit.

name: Banked Presence
rawText: For Rush (10), Assassins gain 1 Crit per Shard in bank. Backup.

name: Brutal Precision
rawText: Gain 60 Crit and 20 Omnivamp.

name: Critical Defenses
rawText: At start of combat, if this Hero is in the front row they gain 250% Crit Defense.

name: Critical Invigoration
rawText: On Crit, heal 50% Crit health and gain 3 Mana.

name: Critical Offense Growth
rawText: On Crit, permanently gain 1 Attack and 1 Magic.

name: Enforced Presence
rawText: On Rush trigger, Assassins gain 15 Crit, 12 Attack, and 12 Magic. Backup.

name: From the Shadows
rawText: At start of combat, if this Hero is in the back row they gain +100% Crit and Stealth for 5 seconds.

name: Lurker
rawText: At start of combat, gain Stealth for 4 seconds. On kill, gain Stealth for 4 seconds.

name: Poisonous Burst
rawText: On Crit, inflict 1 (+1 per 15 Crit) Poison on the target.

name: Poisonous Edge
rawText: Gain +50% Crit against enemies with Poison.

name: Poisonous Eye
rawText: At start of combat, inflict 10 (+25% Crit) Poison on all enemies.

name: Rush Overdrive
rawText: Rush abilities last 3 seconds longer. Backup.

name: Shard Collector
rawText: Every other Crit, gain 1 Shard.

name: Shard Plunderer
rawText: On kill, gain 8 Shards.

name: Burning Acceleration
rawText: Whenever a Duelist attacks an enemy with Burn, they gain 2 Attack Speed. Backup.

name: Burning Attacks
rawText: On auto attack, inflict 1 (+1 per 40 Attack Speed) Burn (Max: 9).

name: Critical Invigoration
rawText: On Crit, heal 50% Crit health and gain 3 Mana.

name: Critical Timing
rawText: For Rush (5), gain +50% Crit. After Stall (20), gain +50% Crit.

name: Debuff Velocity
rawText: On auto attack, gain 1 Crit and 1 Attack per Debuff on the target.

name: Freezing Acceleration
rawText: Whenever a Duelist attacks an enemy with Frost, they gain 2 Attack Speed. Backup.

name: Freezing Attacks
rawText: On auto attack, inflict 1 (+1 per 80 Attack Speed) Frost (Max: 6).

name: Golden Eye
rawText: Every 10 auto attacks, gain 1 Shard.

name: Poisonous Acceleration
rawText: Whenever a Duelist attacks an enemy with Poison, they gain 2 Attack Speed. Backup.

name: Poisonous Attacks
rawText: On auto attack, inflict 1 (+1 per 120 Attack Speed) Poison (Max: 3).

name: Ranger
rawText: Gain 1 Range.

name: Rolling Speed
rawText: Duelists gain 2 Attack Speed per reroll this game. Backup.

name: Rush Dynamo
rawText: Duelists gain 1 Attack Speed per Rush trigger this game. Backup.

name: Scaling Speed
rawText: At start of combat, if this Hero is adjacent to exactly one other Hero they both permanently gain 20 Attack Speed.

name: Stall Dynamo
rawText: Duelists gain 1 Attack Speed per Stall trigger this game. Backup.

name: Arcane Destruction
rawText: On cast, gain 100 Crit.

name: Burning Absorption
rawText: On cast, gain 1 Magic per 8 Burn on enemies in range.

name: Burning Casts
rawText: On cast, inflict 50% Magic Burn on enemies in range.

name: Enchanted Attacks
rawText: On auto attack, deal 100% Magic bonus damage.

name: Fast Cast
rawText: Gain 8 Mana Regen and 40 Starting Mana.

name: Freezing Absorption
rawText: On cast, gain 1 Magic per 5 Frost on enemies in range.

name: Freezing Casts
rawText: On cast, inflict 25% Magic Frost on enemies in range.

name: Hermit
rawText: At start of combat, if this Hero is alone in the back 2 rows they gain +25% Magic and +50% Crit.

name: Instacast
rawText: After Stall (15, Stall 30, and Stall 45), gain 100 Mana.

name: Mage Armor
rawText: At start of combat, if this Hero is in the front row they gain 100% Magic Defense.

name: Magical Growth
rawText: At start of combat, Mages permanently gain 15 Magic. Backup.

name: Stall Certainty
rawText: Stall abilities trigger 6 seconds faster. Backup.

name: Stalled Cold
rawText: After Stall (20), inflict 35% Magic Frost on all enemies.

name: Stalled Growth
rawText: After Stall (30), permanently gain 40 Magic.

name: Stalled Heat
rawText: After Stall (20), inflict 50% Magic Burn on all enemies.

name: Arcane Growth
rawText: On cast, permanently gain 1 Magic.

name: Debuff Amplification
rawText: On cast, increase the amount of each Debuff on enemies in range by 50% Mana Regen.

name: Debuff Channeling
rawText: On cast, gain 1 Mana Regen for each type of Debuff on all enemies.

name: Debuff Protection
rawText: On cast, give the lowest percent health Hero 1 Shield per 2 Debuffs on all enemies.

name: Empowered Magic
rawText: On cast, give other Heroes 100% Mana Regen Attack and 100% Mana Regen Magic.

name: Protective Magic
rawText: On cast, give the lowest percent health Hero 100 (+500% Mana Regen) Shields.

name: Rolling Conduit
rawText: Mystics gain 1 Mana Regen for each reroll this game. Backup.

name: Shard Weaver
rawText: Every other cast, gain 2 Shards.

name: Shield Formation
rawText: At start of combat, give this Hero and adjacent Heroes 250 (+250% Magic, +1000% Mana Regen) Shields.

name: Shield Magnification
rawText: When this Hero applies Shields, apply 50% more Shields.

name: Sideline Empowerment
rawText: Backup Only: At start of combat, give Heroes 4 (+4 per rank) Mana Regen, 25 (+25 per rank) Attack, and 25 (+25 per rank) Magic.

name: Sideline Support
rawText: Backup Only: At start of combat, gain 5 Shards and give Heroes 500 (+500 per rank) Shields.

name: Stall Battery
rawText: On Stall trigger, gain 1 Shard and give Heroes 3 Mana Regen. Backup.

name: Stall Certainty
rawText: Stall abilities trigger 6 seconds faster. Backup.

name: Stall Enlightenment
rawText: After Stall (30), permanently gain 2 Mana Regen.

name: Distraction
rawText: After Stall (10, Stall 20, Stall 30, Stall 40, and Stall 50): Taunt all enemies.

name: Freezing Aura
rawText: When auto attacked, inflict 1 (+1 per 100 Defense) Frost on the attacker (Max: 6).

name: Freezing Presence
rawText: Tanks gain +33% Defense against damage from enemies with Frost. Backup.

name: Freezing Restoration
rawText: When auto attacked by an enemy with Frost, gain 2 HP/S.

name: Poisonous Aura
rawText: When auto attacked, inflict 1 (+1 per 250 Defense) Poison on the attacker (Max: 3).

name: Poisonous Presence
rawText: Tanks gain +33% Defense against damage from enemies with Poison. Backup.

name: Poisonous Restoration
rawText: When auto attacked by an enemy with Poison, gain 2 HP/S.

name: Protector
rawText: This Hero gains +20% Defense for each enemy targeting it.

name: Rear Support
rawText: At start of combat, if this Hero is in the back row all Heroes gain +75% Defense.

name: Resolute
rawText: When auto attacked, gain 1 Defense.

name: Second Wind
rawText: After Stall (35), heal 100% Max HP, gain 100 Mana, and gain +20% Defense.

name: Spiked
rawText: When auto attacked, deal 50% Defense damage to adjacent enemies.

name: Stall Certainty
rawText: Stall abilities trigger 6 seconds faster. Backup.

name: Stalled Defense
rawText: On Stall trigger, gain 45 Defense.

name: The Best Offense...
rawText: Tanks gain 1 Attack and 1 Magic per 3 Defense they have. Backup.

name: Aggressive Presence
rawText: Vanguards gain 40 (+40 per rank) Attack. Backup.

name: Brutal Vitality
rawText: Gain 1000 Max HP and 20 Omnivamp.

name: Bulk Formation
rawText: At start of combat, give this Hero and adjacent Heroes 25% Max Health Max HP.

name: Burning Aura
rawText: On auto attack or when auto attacked, inflict 1 (+1 per 1000 Max Health) Burn on the enemy (Max: 5).

name: Burning Eye
rawText: At start of combat, inflict 1 per 50 Max Health Burn on all enemies.

name: Burning Restoration
rawText: On auto attack or when auto attacked, if the enemy has Burn gain 1 HP/S.

name: Calming Presence
rawText: Vanguards gain 13 (+10 per rank) HP/S. Backup.

name: Distraction
rawText: After Stall (10, Stall 20, Stall 30, Stall 40, and Stall 50): Taunt all enemies.

name: Intimidating Aura
rawText: Each second, deal 2% Max Health damage to adjacent enemies.

name: Rush Overdrive
rawText: Rush abilities last 3 seconds longer. Backup.

name: Rushed Offense
rawText: On Rush trigger, gain 100 Max HP, 12 Attack, and 10 Attack Speed.

name: Rushed Size
rawText: For Rush (12), gain +100% Max HP.

name: Shield Line
rawText: At start of combat, give all Heroes in the front 2 rows 66% Max Health Shields.

name: Vindictive Shields
rawText: The first time each combat this Hero goes below 50% Max HP, they gain 50% Max Health Shields and deal 50% Max Health damage to adjacent enemies.

name: Violent Presence
rawText: Whenever a Vanguard auto attacks or is auto attacked, they gain 25 Shields. Backup.

name: Brutal Force
rawText: Gain 100 Attack and 20 Omnivamp.

name: Critical Aggression
rawText: For Rush (10), gain +100% Crit.

name: Critical Attack Growth
rawText: On Crit, permanently gain 2 Attack.

name: Critical Attacks
rawText: This Hero's auto attacks gain 150 Crit.

name: Critical Invigoration
rawText: On Crit, heal 50% Crit health and gain 3 Mana.

name: Fight and Win
rawText: On damage dealt for Rush (8), gain lasting Shields equal to 50% of the damage dealt.

name: Hit Hard, Hit Fast
rawText: For Rush (8), gain +100% Attack.

name: Ranger
rawText: Gain 1 Range.

name: Rush Overdrive
rawText: Rush abilities last 3 seconds longer. Backup.

name: Rush Strength
rawText: Warriors gain 2 Attack per Rush trigger this game. Backup.

name: Scaling Attack
rawText: At start of combat, if this Hero is adjacent to exactly one other Hero they both permanently gain 25 Attack.

name: Shield Power
rawText: This Hero gains 1 Attack per 10 Shields it has (Max Bonus: 1000).

name: Shielding Presence
rawText: At start of combat, Warriors gain 1000 (+500 per rank) lasting Shields. Backup.

name: Unfiltered Rage
rawText: Gain 2 Omnivamp and 2 Crit per 1% of this Hero's missing health.

name: Victorious Presence
rawText: On combat victory, Warriors permanently gain 20 Attack. Backup.
